nasb.text: But when the crowd had been sent out, He entered and took her by the hand, and the girl got up.

esv.text: But when the crowd had been put outside, he went in and took her by the hand, and the girl arose.

cnv.text: 耶穌趕走眾人之後，進去拉著女孩的手，女孩就起來了。

ccb.text: 耶稣让众人都出去，然后进去拉着女孩的手，女孩就起来了。

csbs.text: 那群人被赶出去以后，耶稣进去，握着女孩的手，那女孩就起来了。
